    Our Lattes

    Barista
    Blends
    for
    Every
    Mood

    (No training required)

    Nice

    Chai
    Latte Mix

    Our Nice Chai is a not too sweet, not too spicy, powdered latte mix meant for making tea lattes simple.

    Shop Now
    Nice

    Matcha
    Latte Mix

    A mix of finely ground green tea and just enough sweetness to blend into delicious matcha lattes or smoothies

    Shop Now
    two roots

    Golden Latte

    Naturally caffeine-free blend of spice and sweetness for making golden lattes simple. Only 6 grams of sugar per serving makes this spicy and sweet treat totally satisfying.

    Shop Now
    Barista

    Chai
    Latte Mix

    Real spices blend with cane sugar and Indian and African black teas to make for an indulgent and spicy sipping experience.

    Shop Now
    Barista

    Matcha
    Latte Mix

    Our Barista Matcha will satisfy those who will like to enjoy a sweet treat. Pure Japanese matcha blends with cane sugar to make for a rich and satisfying sipping experience.

    Shop Now
